days.summary: ByteDance officially launched Seed 2.0 and separately exposed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena, marking a concrete new foundation-model release from one of China’s largest AI investors. Google also shipped AI Edge Gallery, an official mobile app for running Gemma 4 and Gemma 3-family models on-device, while AgentScope 1.0 emerged as a notable agent framework release aimed at large-scale multi-agent simulation and production agentic applications.
